Title: Authorizes the county of Nassau assessor to accept an application for a real property tax exemption from Winners Chapel International New York
Summary: Authorizes the county of Nassau assessor to accept an application for a real property tax exemption from Winners Chapel International New York.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the assessor of the county of Nassau to accept an application for a real property tax exemption from Winners Chapel International New York
